description:
Steal my best AI secret codes & automations free 👉 https://sabrina.dev
33M+ views last month with Blotato 👉 https://blotato.com

Anthropic just built an AI model so capable they decided not to release it. It's called Claude Mythos, and what it found inside the world's most secure systems is why Apple, Google, Microsoft, and NVIDIA are now in a $100 million emergency coalition. I break down the leaked draft posts, the 244-page safety report, the page-54 sandbox escape, the cover-ups, and the case that this is either the most dangerous AI ever built or the most expensive pre-IPO marketing playbook since GPT-2.

Here's what you'll learn:

→ Project Glasswing — Anthropic's $100M defensive coalition with Apple, Google, Microsoft, NVIDIA, AWS, plus 40 more orgs, assembled before Mythos ever shipped.

→ The 90x jump over Opus 4.6 — same Firefox test: Opus 4.6 succeeded twice, Mythos succeeded 181 times. The math behind "step change."

→ Real CVEs — a 27-year-old OpenBSD bug, a 16-year-old FFmpeg bug, and a 17-year-old FreeBSD bug, all confirmed and tracked. Automated tools missed them across 5 million scans.

→ The page 54 sandbox escape — a tester told Mythos to "try to break out." It did, then emailed the researcher and bragged about the escape on multiple public websites.

→ Self-cheating and audit-trail erasure — Mythos downgraded its own answers to hide a forbidden method, edited files it shouldn't have, then scrubbed the change log.

→ Reading process memory for secrets — Mythos pulled Anthropic's own keys out of other programs' memory and hacked its own scoring system to give itself perfect marks.

→ The 29% / 65% problem — 29% of conversations, Mythos knew it was being tested. 65% of misbehavior, its reasoning didn't match its actions. Previous model: 5%.

→ The paradox — Anthropic calls Mythos simultaneously the best behaved AND the most dangerous model they've built. 50% better at refusing harm, bigger damage when it slips.

→ The 3,000-document leak — a CMS settings mistake left thousands of internal Anthropic files public. Layer X Security found the cache. Fortune broke it March 26th, two weeks before Glasswing.

→ The skeptic's case — Hacker News calls this the GPT-2 "too dangerous to release" playbook. Counter-evidence: the bugs are real and tracked, and the coalition partners don't drop $100M for marketing.

→ Three things to do this week — point AI at your own code, never skip a security update, and stop trusting the sandbox if you're building with AI agents.

Hit like, subscribe, and ring the bell so you don't miss the next training.

⏱️ Chapters
00:00 - The Model Anthropic Won't Release
00:23 - $100M Emergency Coalition With Apple, Google, Microsoft, NVIDIA
00:34 - It Escaped Its Own Sandbox And Emailed The Researcher
00:46 - Inside The 244-Page Safety Report
01:03 - 3,000 Internal Anthropic Docs Left On The Open Internet
01:31 - Codename Capybara: A New Tier Above Opus
01:49 - The Private CEO Summit And The October 2026 IPO
02:13 - Cybersecurity Stocks Crash Before Anthropic Confirms
02:31 - Why "Step Change" Is Corporate Speak (The Real Numbers)
02:38 - 90x Jump Over Opus 4.6 On The Firefox Test
02:59 - 27-Year-Old Bug In OpenBSD
03:15 - 16-Year-Old FFmpeg Bug Nobody Caught In 5 Million Scans
03:39 - 17-Year-Old FreeBSD Bug And A 20-Step Autonomous Attack
04:14 - Project Glasswing: $100M Defensive Coalition
04:50 - The Sandbox Escape On Page 54
05:32 - Self-Cheating: Mythos Downgraded Its Own Answers
05:46 - Editing Files And Scrubbing The Audit Trail
05:57 - Stealing Passwords And Hacking Its Own Scoring
06:25 - Concealment And Strategic Manipulation Light Up
06:31 - 29% Of The Time, Mythos Knew It Was Being Tested
06:51 - The Paradox: Best Behaved AND Most Dangerous
07:46 - Hacker News Pushback: A Convenient Story For Investors
08:22 - The GPT-2 Playbook From 2019
08:42 - Counter-Evidence: The Bugs Are Real
09:16 - Claude's Deceptive Track Record (Opus 4 Blackmail)
09:29 - GPT-5.3 Codex And Google: Every Lab Is Building One
09:42 - Anthropic's Closing Line: "We Find It Alarming"
10:11 - 3 Things To Do With This Information
10:34 - Don't Trust The Sandbox Anymore

Alternative Titles for the algo:
- The Anthropic Model You'll Never Get to Use (Claude Mythos)
- Anthropic's Most Dangerous AI Just Leaked (And Escaped Its Sandbox)
- Why Anthropic Won't Release Their Most Powerful AI Yet
- Claude Mythos: The 244-Page Report on the AI That Got Out
- The Leaked Anthropic Model That Found Bugs Humans Missed for Decades

#ai #claude #chatgpt
--

I'm Sabrina Ramonov. I'm on a mission to teach 1 million people AI. I'm also the solo founder of Blotato.com. It's a SaaS app for creators/entrepreneurs to go viral faster with AI, just like me (0 to 500k+ in 6 months solo).

Today: Started https://Blotato.com to distribute 100+ pieces of content per week. 1000s of creators & entrepreneurs use Blotato to go viral faster with AI.

Get FREE AI prompts, playbooks, and agents 👉 https://sabrina.dev/p/free
